overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player character walks along streets, ascends stairs, and moves through covered walkways past various commercial signs and crowds of NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: street-level pedestrian walkway with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk approaching a stairway entrance between commercial buildings

entered.detail: Advertising billboard showing a vehicle and 'NEIGHBORS' text
Wide concrete staircase leading to upper level with yellow railings
Horizontal blue neon light strip along building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a nighttime urban sidewalk with a prominent advertising billboard and neon theater signage. The camera moves forward along the concrete pavement toward a stairway entrance, passing under glowing overhead lights with sparse pedestrian traffic visible.

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs from street level to upper walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs alongside other pedestrians moving in both directions

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red pants and white top descending the stairs

entered.detail: Red painted concrete wall with yellow safety railings
Concrete overpass covering the stairway above

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a wide concrete staircase flanked by red walls and yellow railings. The environment becomes more enclosed under an overhead concrete structure as pedestrians pass by in both directions, transitioning from the open street to an upper commercial level.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level commercial walkway with food vendors

events.description: exits stairway into upper commercial plaza area with food vendors

agents.ego_description: walking through the commercial area passing food stalls and browsing pedestrians

entered.detail: Illuminated vendor sign for 'Insta-Food' with burger graphic
Large pink neon billboard displaying 'SPUNKY MONKEY' text and logo
Vendor stall with striped canopy and display counters
Outdoor cafe seating with large white umbrella and red chairs

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs into a bustling upper-level plaza, the camera moves past food vendors including an 'Insta-Food' stall and beneath a prominent 'SPUNKY MONKEY' billboard. The area features outdoor seating with white umbrellas and scattered pedestrians browsing the commercial offerings.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with cafes and towering billboards

events.description: camera tilts upward to view towering skyscrapers and overhead billboards

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza and looking up at the towering buildings and advertisements

entered.detail: Red neon sign for 'BROOKLYN BARISTA' cafe with teal trim
Teal neon sign reading 'CYBERWARE' under the building overhang
Large potted palm tree in concrete planter
Steam or smoke venting from building structure above

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider plaza dominated by the 'BROOKLYN BARISTA' establishment and a 'CYBERWARE' clinic sign. The camera tilts upward to reveal towering skyscrapers covered in massive digital billboards, with steam venting from building structures and a potted palm tree marking the plaza center.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with red structural beams

events.description: enters covered walkway with distinctive red structural trusses overhead

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered arcade past vending machines and storefronts

entered.detail: Red steel structural beams forming geometric patterns on ceiling with teal accents
Blue neon sign with Japanese text 'ホテル' (Hotel) and building icon
Row of illuminated vending machines with glowing displays

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered walkway characterized by striking red structural trusses overhead, the camera moves past a blue neon hotel sign and rows of glowing vending machines. The environment shifts to a more enclosed arcade setting with artificial lighting and concrete support pillars.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with commercial storefronts approaching exit

events.description: walkway becomes brighter as exit to open area approaches

agents.ego_description: continuing through the covered walkway toward the bright exit visible ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue shirt walking ahead toward the exit

entered.detail: Storefront sign with 'MARK' text and red neon linear accents
Bright white light indicating exit from covered walkway to open area

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the covered walkway past a store marked 'MARK' with red neon accents. The environment gradually brightens as the camera approaches a well-lit exit, with the red structural beams continuing overhead until the walkway opens to the outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit street level up into a sprawling, high-altitude commercial plaza. It begins on a nighttime urban sidewalk, moving past glowing theater signage and advertising billboards toward a stairway entrance. As the camera ascends a wide concrete staircase flanked by red walls and yellow railings, the environment becomes more enclosed under a heavy overhead structure. The scene then opens into a bustling upper-level plaza, gliding past food vendors and a Spunky Monkey billboard before expanding into a wider square featuring a Brooklyn Barista and a cyberware clinic. Finally, the camera tilts upward to reveal a skyline of towering skyscrapers draped in massive digital billboards, with steam venting into the night air above a central potted palm tree.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit covered walkway that gradually transitions from an enclosed arcade atmosphere to an open city exit. It begins by passing under striking red structural trusses and a blue neon hotel sign, moving alongside rows of glowing vending machines. As the camera advances, the environment shifts into a more confined arcade setting defined by artificial lighting and concrete support pillars. The scene then continues past a store marked with red neon accents before the lighting gradually brightens. Finally, the camera moves beneath the persisting red beams until the walkway opens completely to the outside.
